pi_items.source: Verified from export_result.sh line 166: writes to this exact path. Confirmed during live testing: export script produced valid JSON at this path.
Verified from live testing: Odoo 17 running at localhost:8069 inside Docker containers (odoo-web + odoo-db). HTTP health check passes. Screenshots confirm accessible login page and dashboard.
Verified from live testing: XML-RPC authenticate call succeeds with admin/admin on database 'odoo_quality'. setup_task.sh lines 16-17 use these credentials. setup_data.py also uses admin/admin.

Verified from live DB query: quality.check id=1, name='Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish', quality_state='none' after setup, product_id=[1, 'Cabinet with Doors'], point_id=[1, 'Incoming Parts Verification']. Visible in quality checks list screenshot (08_check_form_visual_inspection.png).
Verified from export_result_baseline.json: check_state='none'. setup_task.sh resets it via XML-RPC write quality_state='none'.

Task description specifies this exact name. export_result.sh searches with ilike 'Lot NCR-2024-1247'. setup_task.sh deletes any pre-existing alert with this pattern before task begins. Verified no alert exists at baseline (export_result_baseline.json: alert_found=false).
Verified from live DB: product.product id=1, name='Cabinet with Doors'. Confirmed in full_db_state.json. Ground truth cabinet_id=1.
Verified from live DB: res.partner id=7, name='Gemini Furniture', company_type='company'. Created by setup_task.sh. Confirmed in full_db_state.json and ground_truth.json gemini_id=7.

Odoo priority field uses string values: '0'=Normal, '1'=Low, '2'=High, '3'=Urgent. Verified from existing alerts in full_db_state.json which show priority as string '0' or '1'. The task asks for 'Urgent (3 stars)' which maps to priority='3'.

Task description provides exact text. Verifier checks for 'scar' AND ('quarantine' OR 're-inspect') in the corrective_action field. Field name verified as 'corrective_action' (not 'action_corrective') from live fields_get query during testing.
Task description provides exact text. Verifier checks for 'first-article' AND ('certificate' OR 'qcp' OR 'conformance'). Field name verified as 'preventive_action' from live fields_get query.

Verified from live DB: quality.alert.stage has exactly 3 stages: New (id=1, seq=1), In Progress (id=2, seq=5), Done (id=3, seq=10). Confirmed in full_db_state.json. Status bar is clickable (quality_alert_views.xml line 83: widget='statusbar' clickable='1').

Task description specifies this name. setup_task.sh deletes any pre-existing team with this name. Verified no team exists at baseline (export_result_baseline.json: team_found=false). Existing team 'Quality Control Team' (id=1) confirmed in full_db_state.json.

Task description specifies this name. export_result.sh searches with ilike 'Weld Integrity Verification'. setup_task.sh deletes any pre-existing QCP with this pattern. Verified no QCP exists at baseline (export_result_baseline.json: measure_qcp_found=false).

Verified from live DB: quality.point test_type field accepts values 'passfail', 'measure', 'instructions', 'picture'. Existing QCP 'Screen Dimensional Inspection' (id=3) has test_type='measure', confirming the value is valid. Screenshot 09_qcp_form_measure_type.png shows the Measure type selected in QCP form.

pi_items.metadata_value: Measure weld bead width at joints A, B, C per drawing DWG-CB-0088. Record values in mm.
pi_items.source:
Verified from live DB: QCP instructions are stored in the 'note' field as HTML. Example from existing QCPs in full_db_state.json: note='

Verify all incoming cabinet parts meet dimensional and finish specifications.

'. Verifier checks for keywords 'weld', 'dwg', or 'bead' in stripped HTML.

pi_items.metadata_value: REJECT: Weld non-conformance. Quarantine unit, file NCR per QP-NCR-001.
pi_items.source: Verified from live DB: quality.point has a 'failure_message' field. Existing QCPs show failure_message=false (not yet set). Verifier checks for 'ncr' or 'qp-ncr' keywords in this field.

Task description specifies this name. export_result.sh searches with ilike 'Surface Finish Gate'. setup_task.sh deletes any pre-existing QCP. Verified no QCP exists at baseline (export_result_baseline.json: passfail_qcp_found=false).
Verified from live DB: existing QCPs 'Final Assembly Audit' (id=2) and 'Chair Stability Load Test' (id=5) both have test_type='passfail'. The UI label is 'Pass - Fail'. Value confirmed valid.
Verified from live DB: product.product id=2, name='Acoustic Bloc Screens'. Confirmed in full_db_state.json.
Task description specifies failure message containing 'SF-003'. Verifier checks for this exact code in the failure_message field. This is a synthetic defect code created for the task.
Verified from live DB: stock.picking.type id=1, name='Receipts', code='incoming'. Confirmed in full_db_state.json. All existing QCPs have picking_type_ids=[1].
Verified from setup_task_log.txt: 'alert_count: 18'. Confirmed by counting alerts in full_db_state.json: 18 alerts listed. Distribution: 8 in New stage, 5 in In Progress, 5 in Done.

Verified from setup_task_log.txt: 'point_count: 5'. Confirmed in full_db_state.json: 5 QCPs (Incoming Parts Verification, Final Assembly Audit, Screen Dimensional Inspection, Desk Surface Flatness Check, Chair Stability Load Test).
Verified from setup_task_log.txt: 'check_count: 6'. Confirmed in full_db_state.json: 6 checks listed.
Verified from docker-compose.yml which pulls image 'odoo:17'. Confirmed from Odoo web UI in screenshots showing Odoo 17 interface.
Verified from env.json mounts and setup_odoo.sh: custom addons copied to /opt/odoo/addons/. Initialized with -i quality_control which auto-installs quality and stock modules.

Verified via fields_get XML-RPC call during live testing. The field is 'corrective_action' on quality.alert model, NOT 'action_corrective' as initially assumed. This was a critical fix discovered during live testing.

Verified via fields_get XML-RPC call during live testing. The field is 'preventive_action' on quality.alert model, NOT 'action_preventive'. Confirmed by export_result.sh line 72 which reads this field.

pi_items.verified_value: partner_id field does NOT exist on quality.point in this custom module
pi_items.source: Verified via fields_get XML-RPC call during live testing. The quality.point model in this custom addon does NOT have a partner_id field. This was discovered during live testing and the task description was updated to remove vendor restriction requirements on QCPs. The verifier was updated accordingly to not check for vendor restriction on QCPs.

pi_items.verified_value: norm, tolerance_min, tolerance_max fields do NOT exist on quality.point
pi_items.source: Verified via fields_get XML-RPC call during live testing. The quality.point model does NOT have norm/tolerance_min/tolerance_max fields in this custom module version. Task description and verifier updated to use instructions (note field) instead of numeric measurements.

privileged_info_summary: This task runs on Odoo 17 at http://localhost:8069 with credentials admin/admin, database 'odoo_quality'. The environment has custom quality_control and quality addons. After setup, the quality check 'Visual Inspection - Cabinet Finish' (id=1) is in state 'none' and must be marked as Failed. No alert named 'Lot NCR-2024-1247 - Cabinet Weld Defect' exists at baseline; the agent must create it with product 'Cabinet with Doors' (id=1), vendor 'Gemini Furniture' (id=7, a res.partner record), priority '3' (Urgent). The corrective_action field (NOT action_corrective) must contain 'SCAR' and 'quarantine'. The preventive_action field (NOT action_preventive) must contain 'first-article' and 'certificate' or 'conformance'. Three quality alert stages exist: New (id=1), In Progress (id=2), Done (id=3). The status bar widget is clickable in the alert form view. The agent must create team 'Supplier Incident Response' (via Quality > Configuration > Quality Alert Teams) and assign the alert to it. For QCPs: 'Weld Integrity Verification - Cabinet' must have test_type='measure', product 'Cabinet with Doors', operation Receipts (picking_type id=1), instructions in the 'note' field mentioning weld/DWG/bead, and failure_message containing 'NCR'. 'Surface Finish Gate - Acoustic Screens' must have test_type='passfail', product 'Acoustic Bloc Screens' (id=2), operation Receipts, and failure_message containing 'SF-003'. IMPORTANT: The quality.point model does NOT have partner_id, norm, tolerance_min, or tolerance_max fields in this custom module. The alert must be advanced through all three stages to Done. At baseline there are 18 alerts, 5 QCPs, 6 checks, and 1 team ('Quality Control Team').
